title: cerastium nutans var. apricum
intro: Cerastium nutans var. apricum, also known as Snow-in-Summer, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant with white or pink flowers that resemble tiny stars. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cerastium nutans var. apricum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even help to reduce fever. It is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
